person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Wikipedia

Tancred of Hauteville (c. 980 – 1041) was an 11th-century Norman petty lord about whom little is known. He was a minor noble near Coutances in the Cotentin. Tancred is also known by the achievements of his twelve sons.

Various legends arose about Tancred which have no supporting contemporary evidence that has survived the ages.

Ancestors
The Hauteville family was said by later traditions to descend from Hiallt, a Norseman active in 920, who is credited with founding the village of Hialtus Villa (Hauteville) in the Cotentin of Normandy. Tancred is a supposed descendant of Hiallt, from whom the village of Hauteville and the family drew their name. This cannot be identified with certainty, and some modern scholarship favours Hauteville-la-Guichard over Hauteville in Cotentin.

Family and descendants
With his two wives, he had twelve sons and several daughters, almost all of whom left Normandy for Southern Italy and acquired some prominence there.

With his first wife, Muriella, he had five sons and one daughter:

Serlo (stayed in Normandy)
Beatrix (d. 1101), married first to Armand de Mortain, son of Robert, Count of Eu, and second to a Roger (family unknown)
Geoffrey, lord of Hauteville, count of Loritello (d. 1063)
William Iron Arm, count of Apulia and Calabria (d. 1046)
Drogo, count of Apulia and Calabria (d. 1051)
Humphrey, count of Apulia and Calabria (d. 1057)
According to the Italian chronicler of the Norman feats in the south, Amatus of Montecassino, Tancred was a morally upright man, who would not carry on a sinful relationship and being unable also to live out his life in perfect celibacy, he remarried.

With his second wife, Fressenda (or Fredesenda), he had seven more sons and at least one daughter:

Robert Guiscard de Hauteville, count of Apulia and Calabria (1057), then duke of Apulia, Calabria and Sicily (d. 1085)
Mauger, (d. 1064), count of the Capitanate (part of the Province of Foggia, within Apulia)
William, count of the Principate (d. 1080)
Aubrey (Alberic or Alvared, Alveredus in Latin, sometimes called Alvred or Alfred) (stayed in Normandy)
Humbert (Hubert) (stayed in Normandy)
Tancred (stayed in Normandy)
Roger de Hauteville, count of Sicily from 1062 (d. 1101)
Fressenda, who married Richard I (dead in 1078), count of Aversa and prince of Capua
Other Tancred of Hauteville
Tancred's great-grandson, also bearing the same name, Tancred, Prince of Galilee, was a leader in the First Crusade. The line of descent was:

Tancred the elder
son Robert Guiscard (Duke Robert d'Hauteville)
granddaughter Emma of Hauteville
great-grandson Tancred of Hauteville, who became Prince of Galilee and regent of the Principality of Antioch

sourceList.title: Tancred II of Hauteville, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville是Rabel Tancred de Hauteville的兒子，於0980年出生在法國諾門迪曼其庫塔恩斯。他於1010年與Muriella De Hauteville在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1041年在法國諾門迪曼其豪迪維爾-拉-吉哈德享年61歲。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville was born in 0980, in Coutances, Manche, Normandy, France as the son of Rabel Tancred de Hauteville. He married Muriella De Hauteville in 1010, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1041, in Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville est né en 0980, à Coutances, Manche, Normandie, France, fils de Rabel Tancred de Hauteville. Il a épousé Muriella De Hauteville en 1010, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1041, à Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville wurde 0980 in Coutances, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Rabel Tancred de Hauteville geboren. Er hat 1010 in Europa Muriella De Hauteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1041 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville è nato il nel 0980 nel Coutances, Manche, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Rabel Tancred de Hauteville. Lui sposato Muriella De Hauteville nel 1010, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1041, nel Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hautevilleは0980年にフランスノーマンディマンチェコウタンセスでRabel Tancred de Hautevilleの息子として生まれた。1010年にヨーロッパでMuriella De Hautevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1041年にフランスノーマンディマンチェハウテヴィレ-ラ-グイチャードで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville(은)는 0980년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 코우탠스스에서 Rabel Tancred de Hauteville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1010년 우럽에서 Muriella De Hauteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1041년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 하테비레-라-길처드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville nasceu em 0980, em Coutances, Manche, Normandie, França filho de Rabel Tancred de Hauteville. Ele casou-se com Muriella De Hauteville em 1010, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1041, em Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville родился в 0980 г. в местности коутансесь, манч, норманди, Франция. Его отца звали Rabel Tancred de Hauteville. Он женился на женщине по имени Muriella De Hauteville в 1010 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1041 г. в местности хаутевилле-ла-гуичард, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Tancrède de Hauteville nació en 0980, en Coutances, Manche, Normandie, Francia como hijo de Rabel Tancred de Hauteville. Se casó con Muriella De Hauteville en 1010, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1041, en Hauteville-la-Guichard, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
